name: Sneha Iyer
text: StartupScope told me my original idea had too many competitors in metro cities. I pivoted to Tier-2 towns and got my first 500 users in 3 weeks.

name: Vikram Das
text: The competitor analysis caught a niche player I had completely missed. Saved us months of building the wrong differentiator.

name: Ananya Rao
text: I used to spend weeks researching before starting anything. Now I validate in 5 seconds, tweak, and validate again. It changed how I think about ideas.
